series_metadata.series_description: This series contains records pertaining to schools that have cancelled their certicate(s) of registration.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for four (4) years from date of school closure then destroy all files except those that pertain to surety bonds in existance at the time of the closure or school files that are subject to pending legal action. State Archives to review material prior to disposition, Paper: Wastepaper
